narrative:
Painesville Township has 12,327 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a clear Republican lean of 6.7 percentage points.
